7:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_remember\",\n\"description\": \"Store information in long-term memory. Use for facts, preferences, decisions, and observations that should persist across sessions.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"content\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"content\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The information to store. Be specific and self-contained.\"\n    },\n    \"tags\": {\n      \"type\": \"array\",\n      \"items\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n      \"description\": \"Categorical labels for filtering. Use descriptive tags like 'user-preference', 'api-decision', 'bug-fix'.\"\n    },\n    \"importance\": {\n      \"type\": \"number\",\n      \"minimum\": 0,\n      \"maximum\": 1,\n      \"description\": \"0.0 = transient, 1.0 = critical. High importance memories are promoted to Episodic Memory during consolidation.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_recall"}]
9:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_recall\",\n\"description\": \"Retrieve relevant memories from long-term storage. Use when you need context about past interactions, user preferences, or established facts.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"query\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"query\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"Natural language description of what you're looking for.\"\n    },\n    \"top_k\": {\n      \"type\": \"integer\",\n      \"minimum\": 1,\n      \"maximum\": 50,\n      \"default\": 5,\n      \"description\": \"Maximum number of memories to retrieve.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]

b:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_sleep\",\n\"description\": \"Run sleep consolidation to promote Working Memory entries to Episodic and Semantic memory. Triggers summarization and importance-based promotion.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"properties\": {}\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_stats"}]
d:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_stats\",\n\"description\": \"Get memory system statistics including entry counts across all memory stores, database size, and consolidation status.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"properties\": {}\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_invalidate"}]
f:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_invalidate\",\n\"description\": \"Mark a specific memory as invalidated. Use when information is outdated, incorrect, or explicitly requested to be removed.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"id\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"id\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The memory ID to invalidate.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_triple_add"}]
11:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_triple_add\",\n\"description\": \"Store a structured fact as a subject-predicate-object triple in the temporal knowledge graph. Use for precise, relational knowledge that benefits from graph queries.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"subject\", \"predicate\", \"object\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"subject\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The entity the fact is about.\"\n    },\n    \"predicate\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The relationship or property. Use consistent predicates for the same concept.\"\n    },\n    \"object\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The value or target entity.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"mnemosyne_triple_query"}]
13:["$","$L1d",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_triple_query\",\n\"description\": \"Query the temporal knowledge graph for structured facts. Use for precise lookups and relationship traversal.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"subject\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"Filter by subject entity.\"\n    },\n    \"predicate\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"Filter by relationship type.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]

15:["$","p",null,{"children":["|| Goal | Tool | Example |\n|------|------|---------|\n| Store general info | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember"}]," | User preferences, decisions |\n| Retrieve context | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_recall"}]," | \"What did we decide?\" |\n| Consolidate memories | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_sleep"}]," | End-of-session cleanup |\n| Check system health | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_stats"}]," | Memory counts, DB size |\n| Remove bad data | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_invalidate"}]," | Outdated information |\n| Store relational facts | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_add"}]," | Team structure, dependencies |\n| Precise lookup | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_query"}]," | \"Who reports to Carol?\" |"]}]
